title: Excelize-to-MoonBit port roadmap
description: High-level tracking epic for the Excelize (Go) to MoonBit port. Subissues capture each major phase and quality gates.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: All roadmap epics completed; feature parity tasks closed.

title: Scope and prioritization
description: Identify Excelize feature areas, map to MoonBit packages, and set initial priorities using bd.

title: Catalog Excelize features and package map
description: List Excelize feature areas and map them to MoonBit packages/directories (workbook, worksheet, styles, shared strings, drawings, charts, etc.).
notes: Documented feature map and proposed package layout in docs/porting-plan.md.

title: Prioritize milestones and dependencies
description: Create initial milestone ordering and dependency links in bd so bd ready reflects the intended build sequence.
notes: Set dependencies to enforce milestone order (core foundation before feature slices; feature slices before stabilization).

title: Core file format foundation
description: Implement ZIP + OOXML package basics and minimal workbook/worksheet read-write paths.

title: ZIP container read/write
description: Implement ZIP parsing and emission needed for OOXML packages (file entries, compression, metadata).
notes: Progress update: data descriptor + zip64 read tests added.

title: Deflate decode (fixed + dynamic Huffman)
description: Implement full raw deflate decoding (fixed and dynamic Huffman blocks) to read typical XLSX files.
notes: Implemented full deflate decode (stored/fixed/dynamic Huffman) with table-based decoder and tests.

title: Deflate encode (writer support)
description: Add deflate compression for zip writer (at least fixed Huffman) and tests.
notes: Implemented fixed-Huffman deflate encoder (literal-only) and wired writer to method 8; added encode and zip roundtrip tests.

title: Zip64 and data descriptor support
description: Add Zip64 sizes/headers and data descriptor handling for large or streaming files.
notes: Reader now handles data descriptor flag and zip64 extra sizes/offsets; added tests for descriptor + zip64 extra. Zip64/data descriptor writing remains.

title: Deflate LZ77 compression (match finder)
description: Add length/distance encoding for deflate writer to produce compressed output (beyond literal-only fixed Huffman).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Implemented LZ77 match finder for fixed-Huffman deflate encoder; added compression ratio test; ran moon test zip.

title: Zip64/data descriptor write support
description: Add Zip64 and data descriptor emission in zip writer for large or streaming files.

title: OOXML package scaffolding
description: Implement content types, relationships, and package manifest handling for workbook parts.

title: Workbook/worksheet/shared strings/styles minimal path
description: Implement minimal data model and read/write path for workbook, worksheet, shared strings, and styles.

title: UTF-16 string handling audit and helpers
description: Define string/byte conversion utilities and audit all text indexing/slicing to account for MoonBit UTF-16 strings vs Go UTF-8; add helpers where needed.
notes: Added UTF-16/UTF-8 index helpers + error types, and snapshot tests for offsets/edge cases.

title: Core roundtrip tests and fixtures
description: Add snapshot/roundtrip tests for minimal open/save, including shared strings and styles.

title: Feature slices
description: Incrementally add Excelize features with MoonBit APIs and tests.

title: Cell access APIs
description: Implement get/set cell value APIs and basic types (number, string, bool, date) with tests.

title: Row/column operations
description: Implement row/column insert/delete, dimension updates, and range utilities with tests.

title: Formulas and calc chain
description: Add formula parsing/serialization and calc chain handling with snapshots.

title: Images and drawings
description: Implement image insertion/extraction and drawing relationships with tests.

title: Charts
description: Implement chart creation/serialization and related XML structures with tests.

title: Data validation and conditional formatting
description: Implement validation rules and conditional formatting serialization with snapshots.

title: Stabilization and quality gates
description: API review, tests, docs, and tooling checks before release.

title: Public API review and .mbti updates
description: Review public APIs for idiomatic MoonBit design; confirm generated .mbti changes are expected.
close_reason: Completed stabilization tasks (API review, docs/tests, quality gates, UTF-16 coverage, regression harness)

title: Docs and examples
description: Add README.mbt.md usage examples and docstring tests for key APIs.
close_reason: Completed stabilization tasks (API review, docs/tests, quality gates, UTF-16 coverage, regression harness)

title: Quality gates (moon check/test/info/fmt)
description: Run full MoonBit checks/tests and update snapshots; ensure linting and formatting pass.
close_reason: Completed stabilization tasks (API review, docs/tests, quality gates, UTF-16 coverage, regression harness)

title: UTF-16 string edge-case tests
description: Add tests for string indexing/slicing, shared strings encoding, and XML text handling to cover MoonBit UTF-16 behavior vs Go UTF-8 assumptions.
close_reason: Completed stabilization tasks (API review, docs/tests, quality gates, UTF-16 coverage, regression harness)

title: Performance/regression test harness
description: Define performance baselines (open/save large files) and regression tests for critical APIs.
close_reason: Completed stabilization tasks (API review, docs/tests, quality gates, UTF-16 coverage, regression harness)

title: Remaining Excelize feature parity
description: Implement remaining Excelize features not yet covered: styles/number formats, merges/tables/sparklines, pivots/slicers, streaming, VML shapes, encryption/metadata.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: All child tasks complete (styles, merges, tables, sparklines, pivots, streaming, VML, encryption/doc props).

title: Styles and number formats
description: Design public APIs for styles/number formats (fonts, fills, borders, numFmt) and implement read/write + tests.
close_reason: Implemented styles/number formats with read/write and tests

title: Merged cells and dimensions
description: Implement merge cell ranges, update dimensions, serialize/parse mergedCells blocks with tests.
close_reason: Implemented merge cells + dimension serialization with read/write and tests

title: Tables and structured references
description: Add table definitions, table XML parts, structured references, and roundtrip tests.
close_reason: Implemented table parts, relationships, read/write, and tests

title: Sparklines
description: Implement sparkline XML generation and worksheet integration with tests.
close_reason: Implemented sparkline groups with read/write and tests

title: Pivot tables and slicers
description: Implement pivot table parts, cache, and slicer relationships with tests.

title: Streaming read/write
description: Add streaming writer/reader APIs for large XLSX files; include performance tests.

title: VML shapes and legacy drawings
description: Implement VML shape parts and worksheet relationships with tests for legacy drawings.

title: Encryption and document properties
description: Implement workbook encryption/decryption hooks and editable core/app properties with tests.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Encryption verifier check done; agile/standard encryption and doc props covered by tests (doc_props_test.mbt).

title: Encryption support for OOXML packages
description: Implement XLSX encryption/decryption (standard/agile). Update read/write to detect encrypted packages and add tests with encrypted fixtures.

title: Agile encryption verifier check
description: Investigate why agile_verify_password mismatches on encryptSHA1.xlsx; align with ECMA-376 verifier/HMAC flow and/or implement dataIntegrity HMAC validation instead of zip-header fallback.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Agile verifier still mismatches; added zip-parse fallback for password validation and a decrypt_encrypted_package wrong-password test. Spec/HMAC verification remains unresolved.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Implemented zip-parse validation when agile verifier fails; added decrypt_encrypted_package wrong-password test. Verifier/HMAC algorithm still TBD.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Fixed agile verifier derivation using dedicated block keys and encryptedKey hash algorithm; derive base hash once and added whitebox test for verify true/false. Tests: moon test xlsx/encryption_wbtest.mbt, moon test.

title: Excelize parity audit and gap list
description: Audit mbtexcel public API and feature coverage against excelize, identify any missing features or behavioral gaps, and open follow-up issues with tests.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Parity audit: mbtexcel public API covers core read/write, styles, tables, sparklines, pivots (XML), images/charts, streaming, encryption, doc props, but Excelize exposes additional APIs not yet ported. Created follow-up epic mbtexcel-dai with tasks: sheet management (rename/delete/active/visibility), row/col dimensions & insert/remove, typed cell values/formatting, hyperlinks/rich text/comments, AutoFilter/table/picture ops, sheet properties/page layout/defined names, and formula evaluation.

title: Excelize parity gap implementation
description: Track remaining Excelize API gaps identified in parity audit.

title: Sheet management: rename/delete/active/visibility
description: Implement worksheet management APIs: set sheet name, delete/move/copy sheets, active sheet index, and visibility (hidden/very hidden), with XML write/read and tests.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Implemented sheet management APIs (rename/delete/move/copy/active/visibility) with sheet state/activeTab serialization and name validation. Added sheet management tests and updated fixture/regression snapshots. Tests: moon test xlsx/sheet_management_test.mbt, moon test, moon info && moon fmt.

title: Row/column dimensions, visibility, insert/remove
description: Add row/column dimension support: width/height, outline levels, visibility, styles, insert/remove rows/cols with range adjustments. Include tests.
close_reason: Implemented row/col dimensions, visibility, insert/remove ops with read/write + tests.

title: Typed cell values and formatted reads
description: Implement typed setters/getters (int/float/bool/datetime), cell type handling, and formatted value retrieval aligned with Excelize APIs. Add tests for number formats and date handling.

title: Hyperlinks, rich text, comments
description: Add hyperlink set/get, rich text runs, and comments (VML) APIs with tests.

title: AutoFilter, table ops, picture ops
description: Add AutoFilter APIs, table listing/deletion, and picture retrieval/deletion aligned with Excelize behavior. Include tests.

title: Sheet properties, page layout, defined names
description: Implement sheet-level properties (page layout/margins, header/footer, protection, background, defined names, page breaks) and tests.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Implemented sheet props (margins/layout/header-footer/protection/background), defined names, page breaks, read/write support, and tests. moon test --update still fails due to encryption_wbtest InvalidPassword (existing bug).

title: Formula evaluation (CalcCellValue)
description: Implement formula parsing/evaluation parity for CalcCellValue and related helpers, with tests matching Excelize behaviors.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added a minimal formula parser/evaluator with core operators, ranges, and basic functions (SUM/AVERAGE/MIN/MAX/COUNT/IF), plus Workbook::calc_cell_value(+_rc). Added calc tests and ran: moon test -p xlsx.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Expanded CalcCellValue: added core math/logical/text functions (ABS/INT/TRUNC/ROUND/ROUNDDOWN/ROUNDUP/SQRT/POWER, AND/OR/NOT, LEN/LOWER/UPPER/TRIM, CONCAT/CONCATENATE), Excelize-like coercion tweaks, and quoted sheet refs. Added calc tests and ran: moon test -p xlsx.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Implemented COUNTIF/SUMIF/AVERAGEIF plus COUNTIFS/SUMIFS/AVERAGEIFS with criteria parsing, wildcard matching, range shape handling, and added calc tests.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added COUNTBLANK plus MAXIFS/MINIFS formula evaluation and extended criteria tests.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added AVERAGEA/MAXA/MINA formula support and tests.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added COUNTA formula support with calc tests.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added MEDIAN formula support with numeric/boolean/error tests.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added IFERROR/IFNA formula handling and tests.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added IFS formula support with tests for match/no-match/error/arg-count.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added criteria wildcard escape handling (~*, ~?, ~~) with COUNTIF tests.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added ISBLANK/ISERROR/ISLOGICAL/ISNA/ISNUMBER/ISTEXT/ISNONTEXT support with tests.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added ISERR/ISEVEN/ISODD/N formula support with tests.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added ISREF/ISFORMULA formula support with reference tests.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added ERROR.TYPE formula support and tests; added #NULL! constant for error mapping.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Expanded ISERR/ISERROR handling to include #SPILL!/ #GETTING_DATA with tests.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added NA() formula with tests for argument count.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added SHEET/SHEETS formula support and tests.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added TYPE and T formula support with tests.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Expanded ERROR.TYPE tests for #NULL! and #SPILL! cases.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added PRODUCT/SUMPRODUCT evaluation parity: scalar vs range handling, empty string errors, range strings ignored; added calc tests for PRODUCT/SUMPRODUCT success/error cases. Ran moon info, moon fmt, moon test -p xlsx.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added SUMSQ/SUMX2MY2/SUMX2PY2/SUMXMY2 evaluation with Excelize semantics (empty string handling, range mismatch -> #N/A, zero/invalid elements ignored in SUMX*). Added calc tests for SUMSQ and SUMX* success/error cases. Ran moon info, moon fmt, moon test -p xlsx.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added MOD and QUOTIENT formula evaluation with Excelize semantics (#DIV/0 on zero divisor, truncation behavior). Added calc tests for MOD/QUOTIENT including error cases. Ran moon info, moon fmt, moon test -p xlsx.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added EVEN/ODD/MROUND formula evaluation (rounding away from zero, sign checks, #NUM on sign mismatch/zero multiple). Added calc tests for EVEN/ODD/MROUND including error cases. Ran moon info, moon fmt, moon test -p xlsx.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added GCD/LCM formula evaluation with Excelize semantics (positive-only, empty string handling for LCM, truncation-based gcd/lcm). Added calc tests for GCD/LCM success and error cases. Ran moon info, moon fmt, moon test -p xlsx.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added FLOOR/FLOOR.MATH/FLOOR.PRECISE and ISO.CEILING formula evaluation with _xlfn aliases and Excelize semantics. Added extensive calc tests for floor variants and ISO.CEILING, including error cases. Ran moon info, moon fmt, moon test -p xlsx.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added LN/LOG/LOG10 formula evaluation with Excelize error semantics (arg count, base checks, #NUM/#DIV on invalid base). Added calc tests for LN/LOG/LOG10 success and error cases. Ran moon info, moon fmt, moon test -p xlsx.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added EXP/DEGREES/RADIANS/PI/SQRTPI formula evaluation with Excelize semantics (DEGREES zero -> #DIV/0!, PI no args). Added calc tests for these functions and adjusted expected float strings. Ran moon info, moon fmt, moon test -p xlsx.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added RAND and RANDBETWEEN formula evaluation (deterministic PRNG, error cases, range handling) plus random function tests with range assertions and error checks. Ran moon info, moon fmt, moon test -p xlsx.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added CEILING/CEILING.MATH/CEILING.PRECISE formula evaluation with _xlfn aliases and Excelize argument/error semantics. Added calc tests covering CEILING variants and error cases. Ran moon info, moon fmt, moon test -p xlsx.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Implemented COMBIN/COMBINA formula evaluation and added tests for success and error cases. Ran moon info, moon fmt, moon test -p xlsx (warnings in crypto_aes, defined_name, hash).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added FACT/FACTDOUBLE, MULTINOMIAL, PERMUT, and PERMUTATIONA formula evaluation plus tests for normal/error cases. Ran moon info, moon fmt, moon test -p xlsx (same unused-function warnings).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Implemented DECIMAL/_xlfn.DECIMAL in formula evaluation with hex prefix handling and added coverage tests. Ran moon info, moon fmt, moon test -p xlsx (same unused-function warnings).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Implemented ROMAN formula (forms 0-4 with clamping) and added tests for standard and error cases. Ran moon info, moon fmt, moon test -p xlsx (same unused-function warnings).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Implemented core trig/hyperbolic formulas (ACOS/ASIN/ATAN*, COS/SIN/TAN, ACOT/ACOTH, COT/COTH/CSC/CSCH/SEC/SECH, SINH/TANH) with NaN->#NUM handling and added extensive success/error tests. Ran moon info, moon fmt, moon test -p xlsx (same unused-function warnings).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added BITAND/BITOR/BITXOR/BITLSHIFT/BITRSHIFT, BASE, and ARABIC formula support with helper logic and extensive success/error tests (including array constants and max-length). Ran moon info, moon fmt, moon test -p xlsx (same unused-function warnings).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Implemented BIN/DEC/HEX/OCT conversions in formula eval, added success+error tests, and validated octal digits to match excelize expectations. Ran moon info, moon fmt, and moon test -p xlsx (warnings about unused functions).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Implemented DELTA, ERF/ERFC (incl. PRECISE), and GESTEP using a series-based erf approximation; added success/error tests. Ran moon info, moon fmt, and moon test -p xlsx (existing unused-function warnings).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Implemented BESSELI/BESSELJ/BESSELK/BESSELY with helper series/recurrence functions and added success/error tests (aligned MoonBit double string outputs). Ran moon info, moon fmt, and moon test -p xlsx (existing unused-function warnings).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Implemented CHAR/CLEAN/CODE/UNICHAR/UNICODE/CHOOSE formulas with helper parsing and added success/error tests (including CHOOSE range selection). Ran moon info, moon fmt, and moon test -p xlsx (existing unused-function warnings).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added text functions LEFT/RIGHT/MID/REPT/REPLACE/SUBSTITUTE/FIND/SEARCH/EXACT with helper wildcard search; extended calc tests with cases. Ran moon info, moon fmt, moon test (warnings only).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Implemented VALUE and TEXT formula functions with number parsing (commas, percent, parentheses) and formatting via format_number_code. Added calc tests for VALUE/TEXT cases. Ran moon info, moon fmt, moon test (warnings only).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added ROW/COLUMN/ROWS/COLUMNS support with current-cell context, row/column-only range parsing (A:A, 1:1), and tests. Updated parser to recognize row ranges and expand to full Excel bounds. Ran moon info, moon fmt, moon test (warnings only).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added DATE/TIME/YEAR/MONTH/DAY/HOUR/MINUTE/SECOND formulas with Excel serial conversions plus date/time tests. Ran moon info, moon fmt, moon test (warnings only).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added INDEX and MATCH formulas (with 1D range handling and approx match types) plus lookup tests. Ran moon info, moon fmt, moon test (warnings only).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added VLOOKUP/HLOOKUP formulas with exact/approx range_lookup handling and tests. Ran moon info, moon fmt, moon test (warnings only).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added DATEVALUE/TIMEVALUE parsing with tests; ran moon info/fmt/test (warnings: unused functions).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added XOR/SWITCH and date/time formulas (DATEDIF/DAYS/DAYS360/EDATE/EOMONTH/ISOWEEKNUM/YEARFRAC/WEEKDAY/WEEKNUM/NETWORKDAYS/WORKDAY + .INTL/NOW/TODAY), added tests, added core/env import; ran moon info/fmt/test (warnings only).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added text formulas: PROPER/FIXED/ARRAYTOTEXT/VALUETOTEXT/TEXTJOIN/TEXTAFTER/TEXTBEFORE with helpers and tests; ran moon info/fmt/test (warnings: unused funcs).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Implemented matrix functions (MUNIT/MDETERM/MINVERSE/MMULT/TRANSPOSE), STDEV/STDEVP variants, lookup handling tweaks, and added calc tests; all tests passing.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Implemented VAR/VAR.S/VARA/VARP/VAR.P/VARPA in formula_eval with variance rounding, added calc var tests + error coverage (aligned with excelize calc_test), and verified with moon info/fmt/test (warnings only).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added WEIBULL/WEIBULL.DIST evaluation with Excelize error semantics and rounding parity; added calc tests for values + error cases; ran moon info/fmt/test (warnings unchanged).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Implemented TRIMMEAN (array + percent) with Excelize semantics, added trimmean tests and error cases, and ran moon info/fmt/test (warnings unchanged).

title: Implement lookup/indirect formulas
description: Port lookup-related functions from excelize: LOOKUP (vector/array), XLOOKUP, INDIRECT, ADDRESS, plus needed helpers/tests.

title: Implement text B-variants and UNIQUE
description: Port remaining text functions from excelize: DBCS and *B variants (LEFTB/RIGHTB/MIDB/LENB/FINDB/SEARCHB/REPLACEB) plus UNIQUE; add coverage for UTF-16 behavior.
close_reason: Implemented text B-variants, DBCS stub, and UNIQUE with tests

title: Investigate encryption_wbtest InvalidPassword
description:
Full moon test run fails at xlsx/encryption_wbtest.mbt:438 (read encrypted agile workbook) with InvalidPassword. Repro: run [bobzhang/mbtexcel] test xlsx/encryption_wbtest.mbt:438 ("read encrypted agile workbook") failed: InvalidPassword
Total tests: 107, passed: 106, failed: 1.. Check whether test fixture or decrypt flow regressed, and align expected password/fixtures.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: moon test --update still fails: xlsx/encryption_wbtest.mbt:438 (read encrypted agile workbook) InvalidPassword.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Fixed XML attr parsing to avoid substring matches (s vs spans), which caused InvalidXml row style id. Agile encrypted workbook now reads. Tests: moon test -p xlsx.
